$comment: keemakr Marketplace submission for the kee-hello agent. This is the EntrySubmission the platform's registerEntry() ingests (see keemakr-core src/lib/marketplace/types.ts). Installing it for a tenant creates the 'hello' department + its single agent, gated on the one required connection (Hunter.io) below.
description: A tiny demo agent: give it text and it greets and shouts it back in capitals. The smallest possible Marketplace entry — one agent, one tool, one required connection.
author: fszt

department.label: Hello
department.description: A one-agent demo department that greets and shouts text.

agents.description: Prepends a greeting and returns the text uppercased. Has a single tool (shout); no database, no subagents.

dependencies.reason: Demonstrates the install gate: the agent stays in 'pending_deps' until the tenant connects Hunter.io. (The demo transform itself does not call Hunter — this is the smallest real required dependency to exercise the round-trip.)

changelog: Initial release — greet + shout text transform.
